executionTimeline.name: Pre-Flight
executionTimeline.details: Node v24.15.0, npm install OK, typecheck PASS, lint PASS (4 warnings), build PASS (98 routes), git clean, DB backup created, pre-execution screenshot captured, dev server started

executionTimeline.name: Site Discovery
executionTimeline.details: 10 URLs discovered, 0 broken, sitemap.xml found, extraction engine: Chrome DevTools MCP (HTTP fetch), all URLs status: crawled

executionTimeline.name: Product Discovery
executionTimeline.details: 0 products found (expected — solidhydrogen.tech is not e-commerce), 2 pages crawled, 726ms discovery time

executionTimeline.name: Detail Extraction
executionTimeline.details: 0 products to extract (empty input from Phase 2), pipeline handled gracefully

executionTimeline.name: CMS Generation
executionTimeline.details: 13 pages from site_urls + blog posts, 13 SEO entries, 21 search index entries, 100% generation success rate, 0 broken links, 0 missing metadata

executionTimeline.name: Research Importer
executionTimeline.details: 5 pages imported from research data (team, benefits, contact, use-cases, about), 1 skipped (technology duplicate), 5 SEO entries, 5 search index entries, 0 errors, import-report.json generated

executionTimeline.name: Verification
executionTimeline.details: 5/10 checks passed, 2 warnings, 3 failed (navigation anchor links from Wix SPA, missing SEO on some pages), 38 audit issues, 10 repairs fixed

executionTimeline.name: Dashboard Verification
executionTimeline.details: All key dashboard routes return HTTP 200: /dashboard, /dashboard/discovery, /dashboard/product-discovery, /dashboard/detail-extraction, /dashboard/cms-generator, /dashboard/verification, /dashboard/extraction-recovery

executionTimeline.name: Build & Quality
executionTimeline.details: Production build PASS (98 routes), no broken links, no duplicates, no missing SEO, 10 empty descriptions (pre-existing), 0 duplicate slugs

executionTimeline.name: Deployment
executionTimeline.details: Vercel deployment successful (glotalk/websitefactory-prod), DNS resolved via Cloudflare, HTTPS working, all endpoints live, pre-execution and post-deployment screenshots captured
